title: Ethiopian Stew with Smoky Walnuts
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by traditional Ethiopian cuisine, featuring smoky walnuts for added depth.

ingredients.name: Roasted vegetables (such as carrots and potatoes)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped smoky walnuts and sauté for 2 minutes.
Add the roasted vegetables, Ethiopian stew spice blend, and stew.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
